#### PR description:

Currently this PR includes backports of
  - #50159
  - #50266

these will be removed once the individual backports are merged.

#### PR validation:

MPI unit tests pass.

Without this changes a simple MPI split configuration, where the remote job does nothing but follow the local one, would be 10% slower than a single job without MPI:

...

These changes address that drop in performance:

...

#### Backport status:

Backport of ... to 16.0.x for online NGT tests.
title: Improve the use of MPI communicators [16.0.x]
